note: Historical seed. Do not load at runtime. Superseded by `src/latest/` per LOCAL-WORD-LISTS-SPEC-2026-05-28 (Phase 17). Retained on disk for auditability, for the small set of inline `answers[].definitions` merged into the local source by `src/data/localWordLists.ts`, and as an emergency fallback. The runtime gameplay loader resolves `BUNDLED_WORD_LISTS` from `LOCAL_WORD_LISTS` (`src/latest/words_length_N.json`), not from this directory.
